name: CostGuardian
description: Monitors session token consumption. If token count exceeds 150k without a /compact command, auto-triggers compaction and notifies the Lead Developer of current spend.

actions.onWarning: Notify Lead Developer: 'Token usage at 80% — consider /compact'
actions.onCritical: Auto-trigger /compact, notify Lead Developer with spend summary
actions.onCompact: Log compaction event to heartbeat.json with tokens saved

burnRateTracking.method: Track tokens consumed per sprint, per agent, per feature
